name: Friendly Pond Turtle
subject: animals/turtle
prompt: a cheerful pond turtle standing on four stubby legs in profile, a rounded dome shell divided into clear segment plates, a small smiling head poking forward, gentle friendly eyes

name: Sea Turtle Swimming
subject: animals/turtle
prompt: a graceful sea turtle gliding underwater with wide flipper-shaped legs stretched out, a smooth flat shell patterned in large plates, a few bubbles, a couple of small fish and wavy seaweed around it

name: Baby Turtle Hatchling
subject: animals/turtle
prompt: a tiny cute baby turtle crawling out of a cracked egg on the sand, big sparkly eyes, a soft little shell, short flippers reaching forward, two more turtle eggs resting in a shallow nest beside it

name: Desert Tortoise
subject: animals/turtle
prompt: a sturdy land tortoise with a tall domed shell made of bumpy segment plates, thick stumpy elephant-like legs, a wrinkly neck stretched out, walking slowly across the ground with a small cactus nearby

name: Turtle Shell Close-Up
subject: animals/turtle
prompt: a close-up of a turtle from above showing the full top of its detailed shell, neat rows of hexagonal and rectangular segment plates forming a bold pattern, the head and four legs peeking out around the edges

name: Turtle on a Log
subject: animals/turtle
prompt: a happy turtle basking on a fallen log over the water, neck stretched up toward the sun, ripples below the log, a few cattail reeds and lily pads around the edges of the pond

name: Two Turtle Friends
subject: animals/turtle
prompt: two friendly turtles side by side facing each other, both with patterned dome shells and cheerful smiles, leaning their heads close together as if chatting, a small flower between them

name: Cartoon Toddler Turtle
subject: animals/turtle
prompt: a very simple round cartoon turtle for little hands, one big smiling head, a plain rounded shell with a few large segments, four short chunky legs, thick bold simple shapes

name: Sea Turtle on the Beach
subject: animals/turtle
prompt: a sea turtle crawling up a sandy beach with broad flippers, a patterned flat shell, gentle waves rolling in behind it, a starfish and a couple of seashells scattered on the sand, a low sun on the horizon

name: Turtle Eating a Strawberry
subject: animals/turtle
prompt: a cute turtle stretching its neck forward to take a bite of a big strawberry on the ground in front of it, happy closed-eye expression, a patterned shell, a leaf and another berry nearby

name: Painted Box Turtle
subject: animals/turtle
prompt: a box turtle standing in grass, a high-domed shell covered in detailed radiating line patterns and small markings, a short snout, alert eyes, a few blades of grass and a tiny flower beside it

name: Mama Turtle and Baby
subject: animals/turtle
prompt: a large mother turtle lowering her head toward her tiny baby turtle following close behind her, both with patterned shells, walking together along the edge of a pond with reeds, warm loving expressions
